api_access.conditions: Developer API access is governed by separate Apple Developer Program License Agreements available at developer.apple.com. Requires enrollment in Apple Developer Program and acceptance of applicable developer terms.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated scraping or data harvesting of Apple websites and services is not permitted without explicit written authorization from Apple.

post_content.conditions: User-generated content subject to Support Communities Terms of Use and applicable service-specific terms. Apple reserves rights to moderate or remove content that violates community guidelines.

allow_training.conditions: Apple's privacy policy emphasizes on-device processing and states that data processed via Private Cloud Compute is never stored or accessible to Apple. Apple does not use personal data for AI/ML model training without user consent.

create_account.conditions: Requires acceptance of Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions and iCloud Terms of Service. Users must meet minimum age requirements. Apple ID creation is subject to applicable sales policies.

make_purchases.conditions: Purchases subject to Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions, Sales Policies, and applicable regional consumer law rights. Apple Gift Card Terms and Conditions apply to gift card purchases.
